title: Introduction to Google Cloud Platform
description: Learn the basics of GCP, including Compute Engine, Cloud Storage, and BigQuery. Perfect for beginners!

title: Vertex AI: Building Generative AI Apps
description: A deep dive into Vertex AI and how to integrate Gemini models into your applications.

title: Cloud Native Architecture Patterns
description: Expert talk on designing scalable and resilient cloud-native systems using microservices and Kubernetes.

title: Kubernetes 101: Hands-on Lab
description: Get hands-on experience with K8s. Deploy your first cluster and manage workloads like a pro.

title: Serverless with Cloud Run
description: Master serverless deployment with Google Cloud Run. Learn how to containerize and scale effortlessly.

title: Future of Cloud Computing in 2026
description: Join our community experts for an evening discussion about the latest trends in cloud and AI.
